mapper.select: select count(obmo.ordered_book_id) from book b join ( select mo.member_id, ob.orders_id, ob.book_id, ob.ordered_book_id from ordered_book ob join ( select m.member_id, o.order_id from orders o join member m on m.member_id = o.member_id ) mo on ob.orders_id = mo.order_id) obmo on b.book_id = obmo.book_id where b.book_id = #{bookId} and obmo.member_id = #{memberId};
